EnterpriseSDK
Table of Contents

Interface ILasToRasterFunctionArguments

Namespace
ESRI.ArcGIS.DatasourcesRaster
Assembly
ESRI.Server.DatasourcesRaster.dll

Provides access to members that control Las to raster conversion.

[InterfaceType(ComInterfaceType.InterfaceIsIUnknown)]
[Guid("38CFFCFE-BA62-442F-A702-8F0D7F96E581")]
public interface ILasToRasterFunctionArguments

Properties

AvgPointSpacing

Average point spacing.

double AvgPointSpacing { get; set; }

Property Value

double

Examples

Sample Snippet

CacheMaxNumSurfaces

Maximum number of different Las surfaces kept in this cache folder.

int CacheMaxNumSurfaces { get; set; }

Property Value

int

Examples

Sample Snippet

CacheRasterZTolerance

Z tolerance for Las rasters in the image cache folder, used for compression.

double CacheRasterZTolerance { get; set; }

Property Value

double

Examples

Sample Snippet

CellAggregationType

Cell aggregation type (how to bin).

esriRasterLasCellAggregationType CellAggregationType { get; set; }

Property Value

esriRasterLasCellAggregationType

Examples

Sample Snippet

CellWidth

Cell width.

double CellWidth { get; set; }

Property Value

double

Examples

Sample Snippet

ClassTypesSelected

Class types selected, e.g., esriRasterLasClassGround, 217.

ILongArray ClassTypesSelected { get; set; }

Property Value

ILongArray

Examples

Sample Snippet

DataType

Data type.

esriRasterLasDataType DataType { get; set; }

Property Value

esriRasterLasDataType

Examples

Sample Snippet

Extent

Extent specified by the user, or extracted from the LAS files.

IEnvelope Extent { get; set; }

Property Value

IEnvelope

Examples

Sample Snippet

IgnoreSpatialReferenceInLasFiles

Ignore spatial reference in Las files.

bool IgnoreSpatialReferenceInLasFiles { get; set; }

Property Value

bool

Examples

Sample Snippet

LasFile

The input Las file.

string LasFile { get; set; }

Property Value

string

Examples

Sample Snippet

LasFileVersion

The input Las file version.

string LasFileVersion { get; set; }

Property Value

string

Examples

Sample Snippet

LasFolder

The input Las folder.

string LasFolder { get; set; }

Property Value

string

Examples

Sample Snippet

MaxHoleWidthFilled

Fill holes up to this width or height by interpolation from hole boundaries.

double MaxHoleWidthFilled { get; set; }

Property Value

double

Examples

Sample Snippet

NumPointsTotal

Total number of points for all Las files, all return types.

double NumPointsTotal { get; set; }

Property Value

double

Examples

Sample Snippet

ReturnTypesSelected

Return types selected, e.g., esriRasterLasReturnFirst, 13.

ILongArray ReturnTypesSelected { get; set; }

Property Value

ILongArray

Examples

Sample Snippet

SpatialReference

The spatial reference to be used, if NOT set in the Las file(s).

ISpatialReference SpatialReference { get; set; }

Property Value

ISpatialReference

Examples

Sample Snippet

TinToRasterInterpolationType

Tin to raster interpolation type (how to rasterize the tin: Linear or NN).

esriSurfaceInterpolationType TinToRasterInterpolationType { get; set; }

Property Value

esriSurfaceInterpolationType

Examples

Sample Snippet

UseTinning

Use tinning.

bool UseTinning { get; set; }

Property Value

bool

Sample Snippet

VoidFillMethod

Void fill method.

esriRasterLasVoidFillMethod VoidFillMethod { get; set; }

esriRasterLasVoidFillMethod

double ZMax { get; set; }
